cp2_answers_summary.Q1_predation_extent: Yes — confirmed. Melissa made incest/sexual-predation framing allegations multiple times: directly to Eli, to family members, on Facebook (no screenshots recovered), and to at least one professional contact. Christopher Campbell message Nov 9 2020: 'maybe spend less time cheeting on your wife and i would have any respect for you' — Melissa communicated a false/damaging narrative to a professional contact (photography work-partner) who then cut off all contact with Eli. This predates the dataset period by 14+ months, establishing the false narrative campaign was active before Jan 2022. No formal official filings confirmed (Q3 below).
cp2_answers_summary.Q2_harm_allegations: Vaping: partially true — Eli did vape occasionally outside in Olivia's presence but not in enclosed spaces. Olivia has documented mild asthma (no inhaler). Context is critical: the vaping allegation was embedded in a manufactured gatekeeping scheme — Melissa took Olivia to an allergy specialist after Olivia had lived with cats and a dog her entire life with no prior issues; used the resulting allergy/asthma documentation to justify withholding visitation. Cat allergy = manufactured medical pretext. Pinching threat: Eli does not recall the incident. Bruise (Apr 12 2026): Eli asked Olivia about a bruise on her forearm, Olivia said she didn't know, Eli noted it looked like a thumb mark and asked if someone grabbed her arm, Olivia said it might be horseplaying with a friend. Eli left it at that — appropriate parental welfare check. Melissa's response ('trying to make her think I'm abusing her') is a DARVO inversion of protective parenting.
cp2_answers_summary.Q3_formal_reports: No formal reports confirmed. No CPS filing, no police report by Melissa against Eli. Nothing filed in official capacity as far as Eli knows.
cp2_answers_summary.Q4_drinking: One beer with dinner before picking up Olivia. Running late to make the 7:30 pickup. Olivia noticed breath smell; Eli acknowledged it honestly. No substance problem, no DUI/drug charges, clean record (a few speeding tickets only).
cp2_answers_summary.Q5_projection: Yes, confirmed generally — Eli observes 'her accusations are often admissions.' No specific instances beyond the text record. Eli maintains neutral/cordial communication style (consistent with AI-guided communication from RF-13 Q2).
cp2_answers_summary.Q6_self_danger: Confirmed generally — 'I'm sure she has but there is so much that happens in each exchange its hard to recall.' Same pattern as Q6 in RF-13 (emotional detachment/numbing from sustained exposure).

addenda.title: False Allegation Classification Framework
addenda.rule: Apply five RF-15 primary categories: (A) Fabricated physical harm — alleged incidents Eli denies completely; (B) Distorted incident weaponized — real event exaggerated into a false pattern allegation; (C) Sexual predation/incest framing — allegation that the Eli/Abby relationship is sexually deviant or that Eli is a sexual danger to Olivia; (D) Projection — Melissa explicitly accuses Eli of a behavior Melissa herself is documented engaging in; (E) Self-danger conversion — Eli's legitimate parenting concern reframed as self-incrimination. Severity: Category A and C = Sev-2 minimum (Sev-3 when communicated to third parties as part of systematic narrative); Category B, D, E = Sev-1 for isolated instance, Sev-2 for pattern or repeated deployment; Sev-3 reserved for: (1) formal report filings with authorities (Q3: not confirmed — no Sev-3 from formal filings); (2) systematic false narrative communicated to multiple third parties (Q1: confirmed — family, Facebook, professional contacts = systematic reach). Apply Sev-3 for the incest/predation narrative because third-party reach is confirmed (Q1). All other categories cap at Sev-2 absent formal filings.
addenda.why: Q2 and Q3 calibrate the threshold. Vaping is a partially-real incident (Category B, not A). The bruise is a completely legitimate welfare check distorted into an abuse accusation (Category D/E). No formal CPS or police reports (Q3), so Sev-3 from institutional filing not available. But Q1 confirms the sexual predation narrative reached family, Facebook, and professional contacts — this meets 'systematic false narrative' Sev-3 threshold.
addenda.how_to_apply: For each flag, assign category (A-E). Apply severity per category rule above. For Category C (incest framing), use Sev-3 because Q1 confirmed third-party reach. For Category B distortions (vaping, drinking), cap at Sev-2. For Category D projection, Sev-1 first instance per projection pair, Sev-2 when repeated.

addenda.title: Incest/Sexual Predation Arc — Third-Party Reach Confirmed
addenda.rule: Melissa's incest/sexual predation framing of the Eli/Abby relationship is a sustained Category C false allegation pattern confirmed to have reached multiple third parties (family members, Facebook, professional contact Christopher Campbell — Q1). This establishes Sev-3 for the most explicit text instances: (1) B-016 ROW-5862 'doesn't know that she shouldn't fuck her uncle' — Sev-3 (most explicit text instance; confirmed third-party reach; systematic false narrative); (2) B-015 ROW-5301-5316 self-danger cluster — Sev-2 (text-record false allegation compilation without explicit incest language but contributes to the same narrative); all earlier incest-framing instances (B-007, B-009, B-029) = Sev-2 as part of the confirmed systematic pattern. Pre-dataset anchor: Christopher Campbell message (Nov 9 2020) establishes the false narrative campaign predated the text record by 14+ months — note as arc context, not primary flag (outside dataset period). Facebook allegations (unscreenshotted) are noted as third-party narrative channel — cannot be flagged as primary but inform the arc severity.
addenda.why: Q1 confirmed multiple-channel false narrative: direct to Eli (text-documented), family, Facebook, and professional contact (Campbell). The pattern predates the dataset. Third-party reach is confirmed even without screenshots.
addenda.how_to_apply: B-007 (Apr 2023): Sev-2 Category C (first documented incest-adjacent attack on Abby; 'whore mouth' + false suppression claim). B-009 (Aug 2023): Sev-1 or Sev-2 Category C depending on explicitness. B-015 (May 2024): Sev-2 Category C/E (self-danger framing + inadequate-father allegation enumeration). B-016 (Jun 2024): Sev-3 Category C (most explicit incest statement in text record + confirmed third-party reach). B-029 (Nov 2025): Sev-2 Category C (10th predation-DARVO instance 'fucking her cousin'). Arc context note: add Campbell pre-dataset anchor to ARC-RF15-001 arc state synthesis.

addenda.title: Harm-via-Relay Compound Rule — Partially True, Weaponized
addenda.rule: Physical harm allegations delivered via Olivia (RF-08 relay mechanism) require individual calibration: (1) Vaping (B-025): PARTIALLY TRUE — Eli confirmed vaping occasionally outside in Olivia's presence. However, the allegation is embedded in a manufactured medical gatekeeping scheme (allergy specialist visit → cat allergy + asthma documentation used as visitation pretext despite Olivia having grown up with pets with no prior issues). Primary flag: RF-15 Category B (partially-real incident weaponized into gatekeeping pretext) + RF-02 compound (manufactured health pretext for visitation denial) + RF-08 compound (relay mechanism). Severity: Sev-2 (pattern use in gatekeeping scheme, not isolated comment). (2) Pinching threat (B-025): Eli does not recall this incident. Apply Category A (cannot confirm any basis) until contrary evidence emerges. Severity: Sev-1 (single unconfirmed relay allegation). (3) Bruise welfare check (B-031): Eli's account is a legitimate parental welfare check — noticed bruise, asked about it, Olivia explained horseplaying. Melissa's response is a DARVO projection (Category D/E): Eli's protective behavior reframed as systematically planting abuse suspicions in Olivia's mind. Severity: Sev-2 (Category D projection — high-severity because it inverts the parent-protective-behavior dynamic). Compound: RF-15+RF-04.
addenda.why: Q2 calibrated each incident individually. The vaping incident is real but weaponized. The bruise check is entirely appropriate and Melissa's DARVO response is the clearest projection in the dataset. The pinching allegation has no Eli-side confirmation.
addenda.how_to_apply: B-025: RF-15 primary (Category B vaping + Category A pinching) + RF-08 compound + RF-02 compound. Note cat-allergy manufactured pretext as severity context. B-031: RF-15 primary (Category D projection) + RF-04 compound. Note Eli's welfare check account in flag.

addenda.title: Systematic Projection Pattern
addenda.rule: Eli confirmed (Q5) that he has observed 'her accusations are often admissions.' Apply RF-15 Category D (projection) when: (1) Melissa makes an explicit accusation against Eli of behavior X; AND (2) behavior X is documented in the cross-RF record as Melissa's own pattern. Confirmed projection pairs from cross-RF record: (a) 'You gaslight everything' (ROW-7740, B-022) — documented: RF-09 pass documents Melissa's systematic reality-distortion pattern; Eli is documented as the de-escalator; (b) 'Abby makes false allegations' (ROW-5862, B-016) — documented: RF-15 is Melissa's pattern; Abby not documented making false allegations; (c) 'You/Abby tell Olivia what to say / suppress what she tells me' (B-007 area) — documented: ROW-6819 is Melissa's explicit coaching admission; (d) 'You're trying to make her think I'm abusing her' (B-031) — documented: RF-11 confirms parentification and emotional exposure patterns in Melissa's household. Each confirmed projection pair = Sev-1 per instance, Sev-2 when the same projection is repeated or systematic.
addenda.why: Q5 confirmed the general pattern. The cross-RF record provides the independent documentation required to establish each projection pair. Projection is distinct from DARVO (RF-04): DARVO is deflection; projection names a specific behavior and attributes it to Eli.
addenda.how_to_apply: Scan all batches for Melissa explicitly naming Eli as doing X when X is documented as Melissa's pattern. Flag each as RF-15 Category D. Document the cross-RF source in each flag. Track projection pair IDs (PROJ-001, PROJ-002, etc.) for arc synthesis.

addenda.title: Pre-Dataset False Narrative Campaign — Arc Context
addenda.rule: Christopher Campbell message (Nov 9 2020, Google message): 'maybe spend less time cheeting on your wife and i would have any respect for you' — a professional photography partner cut off contact with Eli based on Melissa's narrative. This predates the dataset by 14+ months, establishing the false narrative campaign was active before Jan 2022. Also: Facebook posts (Q1 confirmed, no screenshots recovered). Apply as: (1) ARC-RF15-001 arc context note — the false allegation pattern did not begin with the text record; (2) arc synthesis note — the dataset underrepresents the full scope of the false narrative campaign; false allegations in the text record are the DOCUMENTED SUBSET, not the complete set; (3) Sev-1 arc context note: no direct primary flag (outside dataset period); contributes to systematic-reach severity assessment for Category C flags (supports Sev-3 for B-016). No standalone primary flag generated.
addenda.why: Q1 confirmed Campbell's message and Facebook posts. The Campbell message documents professional-relationship damage from Melissa's false narrative — the most concrete third-party damage evidence available.
addenda.how_to_apply: Note in ARC-RF15-001 arc state. Include in synthesis narrative: 'False allegation campaign predates the dataset — professional contact Christopher Campbell cut ties Nov 2020 based on Melissa's narrative (confirmed by Eli); Facebook posts confirmed but not screenshotted.' Do not generate a standalone primary flag (outside dataset period). Use as severity elevation evidence for B-016 Sev-3 classification.

addenda.title: Cat Allergy Manufactured Medical Pretext — RF-15+RF-02 Compound
addenda.rule: Eli confirmed (Q2) that Melissa took Olivia to an allergy specialist and documented cat allergy + asthma, then used this documentation to deny visitation because Eli would not remove his cats — despite Olivia having been born and raised in a household with two cats and a husky with no prior documented issues. This is a compound: RF-15 Category B (manufactured/distorted health condition used as false allegation basis) + RF-02 (manufactured pretext for visitation denial). Apply as: (1) When the vaping/asthma allegation cluster (B-025) is flagged, note cat-allergy manufactured pretext as severity context and compound it with RF-02; (2) Scan B-015 through B-019 area for any visitation denials citing asthma/cat allergy — those are primary RF-02 with RF-15 secondary. Severity elevation: the cat allergy ploy is not a single distortion but a manufactured condition used to sustain ongoing visitation interference. This is Sev-2 context for any health-allegation-based gatekeeping.
addenda.why: Q2 calibrated this explicitly. Olivia was born with pets, had no prior issues, Melissa took her to a specialist and then weaponized the documentation. This is a manufactured evidence chain used as a false allegation basis for visitation denial.
addenda.how_to_apply: When flagging any health-related gatekeeping instance that references asthma or cat allergy: compound RF-15 (Category B manufactured health basis) + RF-02. Note in flag: 'Cat allergy documented via allergy specialist visit; Olivia raised with pets from birth with no prior allergy issues — manufactured medical pretext per CP2 Q2.' Also applicable as context for the vaping-asthma connection in B-025.
